document.name: workflow-builder-self-edit-livesync
document.title: Self-edit live-sync: edit workflow-builder UI → live on the dev preview in seconds
document.summary: Clone workflow-builder, make a visible UI edit on the sign-in page, push src to the workflow-builder-dev (vite HMR) pod via Dapr service invocation (/__sync), and verify the change is live on the preview — skaffold-style live-sync from a workflow, no kubectl/RBAC. P1 of the self-update loop (docs/agentic-deploy-inspect-loop.md).

marker.title: Visible marker string
marker.description: Replaces the 'Workflow Builder' wordmark on the sign-in page; verified live.

with.command:
${ "export REPOURL=" + ((.trigger.repoUrl // "PittampalliOrg/workflow-builder") | @sh) + "; export REPOREF=" + ((.trigger.repoRef // "") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work
rm -rf repo
BF=""; [ -n "$REPOREF" ] && BF="--branch $REPOREF"
git clone --depth 1 --single-branch $BF https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/$REPOURL.git repo
cd /sandbox/work/repo
git config user.email agent@workflow-builder.local
git config user.name "workflow-builder agent"
echo CLONED $(git rev-parse HEAD) on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" }

${ "export MARKER=" + ((.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work/repo
F=src/routes/auth/sign-in/+page.svelte
sed -i "s|>Workflow Builder<|>$MARKER<|" "$F"
grep -qF "$MARKER" "$F" || { echo EDIT_FAILED; exit 1; }
echo EDITED "$F"; grep -n "$MARKER" "$F"" }

${ "export DEVAPPID=" + ((.trigger.devAppId // "workflow-builder-dev") | @sh) + "; export SYNCTOKEN=" + ((.trigger.syncToken // "") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
cd /sandbox/work/repo
tar -czf /tmp/src.tgz src
TOKHDR=""; [ -n "$SYNCTOKEN" ] && TOKHDR="-H x-sync-token:$SYNCTOKEN"
HTTP=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/sync.out -w "%{http_code}" -X POST --data-binary @/tmp/src.tgz -H "content-type: application/gzip" $TOKHDR "http://localhost:3500/v1.0/invoke/$DEVAPPID/method/__sync")
echo "SYNC_HTTP=$HTTP"; cat /tmp/sync.out 2>/dev/null; echo
[ "$HTTP" = 200 ] || { echo SYNC_FAILED; exit 1; }
echo SYNCED" }

${ "export MARKER=" + ((.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") | @sh) + "; export DEVURL=" + ((.trigger.devServiceUrl // "http://workflow-builder-dev.workflow-builder.svc.cluster.local:3000") | @sh) + ";" + "
set -e
for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  if curl -sf "$DEVURL/auth/sign-in" | grep -qF "$MARKER"; then echo "LIVE_OK after ${i}s"; exit 0; fi
  sleep 1
done
echo NOT_LIVE; curl -s "$DEVURL/auth/sign-in" 2>/dev/null | head -c 800; exit 1" }

agentConfig.name: Live-sync UI verifier
agentConfig.instructions: You are a UI verifier. The workflow-builder-dev preview is served at the URL given in the prompt. Using the Playwright MCP browser tools (server 'playwright'): browser_navigate to <devUrl>/auth/sign-in , browser_snapshot, and browser_take_screenshot (filename 'critic-shot.png' -> /sandbox/work/critic-shot.png). Confirm whether the page VISIBLY shows the exact marker text given in the prompt (it replaced the 'Workflow Builder' wordmark on the sign-in page). Then WRITE /sandbox/work/verdict-final.json as STRICT JSON: {"markerPresent": <bool>, "markerText": "<the marker>", "evidence": "what you saw"}. End with a one-line summary.

body.prompt: ${ "Verify the live-sync change is rendered. Preview URL: " + (.trigger.devServiceUrl // "http://workflow-builder-dev.workflow-builder.svc.cluster.local:3000") + " . The sign-in page should now show the marker text: " + (.trigger.marker // "WFB live-sync OK") + " . Navigate, screenshot, and write the verdict per your instructions." }
